steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0918.171614.28.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify the active and inactive merchant acquirers can be added

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Select 'Merchant 2 for C112172' business unit using filter
Select 'acquirer for gateway' acquirer MID within dialog
Click 'Add merchant acquirer button'
